시편 44:1.content: We have heard with our ears, God; our fathers have told us what work you did in their days, in the days of old.

시편 44:2.content: You drove out the nations with your hand, but you planted them. You afflicted the peoples, but you spread them abroad.

시편 44:3.content: For they didn’t get the land in possession by their own sword, neither did their own arm save them; but your right hand, your arm, and the light of your face, because you were favorable to them.

시편 44:4.content: You are my King, God. Command victories for Jacob!

시편 44:5.content: Through you, will we push down our adversaries. Through your name, we will tread down those who rise up against us.

시편 44:6.content: For I will not trust in my bow, neither shall my sword save me.

시편 44:7.content: But you have saved us from our adversaries, and have shamed those who hate us.

시편 44:8.content: In God we have made our boast all day long, we will give thanks to your name forever.

시편 44:9.content: But now you rejected us, and brought us to dishonor, and don’t go out with our armies.

시편 44:10.content: You make us turn back from the adversary. Those who hate us take plunder for themselves.

시편 44:11.content: You have made us like sheep for food, and have scattered us among the nations.

시편 44:12.content: You sell your people for nothing, and have gained nothing from their sale.

시편 44:13.content: You make us a reproach to our neighbors, a scoffing and a derision to those who are around us.

시편 44:14.content: You make us a byword among the nations, a shaking of the head among the peoples.

시편 44:15.content: All day long my dishonor is before me, and shame covers my face,

시편 44:16.content: at the taunt of one who reproaches and verbally abuses, because of the enemy and the avenger.

시편 44:17.content: All this has come on us, yet we haven’t forgotten you. We haven’t been false to your covenant.

시편 44:18.content: Our heart has not turned back, neither have our steps strayed from your path,

시편 44:19.content: though you have crushed us in the haunt of jackals, and covered us with the shadow of death.

시편 44:20.content: If we have forgotten the name of our God, or spread out our hands to a strange god,

시편 44:21.content: won’t God search this out? For he knows the secrets of the heart.

시편 44:22.content: Yes, for your sake we are killed all day long. We are regarded as sheep for the slaughter.

시편 44:23.content: Wake up! Why do you sleep, Lord? Arise! Don’t reject us forever.

시편 44:24.content: Why do you hide your face, and forget our affliction and our oppression?

시편 44:25.content: For our soul is bowed down to the dust. Our body clings to the earth.

시편 44:26.content: Rise up to help us. Redeem us for your loving kindness’ sake.
